title: erodium botrys var. gasparrinii
intro: Erodium botrys var. gasparrinii is a plant species within the Geranium family (Geraniaceae), commonly known as the red-stemmed storksbill. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erodium botrys var. gasparrinii include the potential treatment of wounds, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
